recent_observations_add.author: claude_code
recent_observations_add.note: First Coach tab session — 15-item translation drill, raw score 1/15 but ~5–7 false negatives from typos + article drops on otherwise-valid answers. Pattern feedback fired correctly on 2/15 (clean_for_vacuum, on_next_week). Engaged through all 15 items (avg ~80s, max 154s on tr_anna_001). Confirms existing weak_patterns: typo cluster (Vocabulary input gap), article drops (Grammar mechanics), preposition variants still surface at low n. s90r2 ships article tolerance + per-item save in the engine; content batch should swap to shorter B1 prompts before next session.

engagement_notes: Engages in bursts; last active 2026-04-30 (Coach tab, full 15-item session). Input-type accuracy ~20pts lower than mcq — keep mcq:gap:input mix at ~50:30:20 to avoid demoralising. RU translation for grammar rules helps. Sessions <50% → reduce complexity per profile. B2 free-translation prompts in the v1 library are too hard at MVP — content should drop to shorter B1 prompts and ignore article scoring (engine already does this in s90r2).
